ogTitle: Faraway Hill vs Farrell Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Faraway Hill and Farrell Flat.
heading: Faraway Hill vs Farrell Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Faraway Hill, South Australia and Farrell Flat, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Farrell Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Faraway Hill (50/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Faraway Hill or Farrell Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Faraway Hill has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Farrell Flat scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Faraway Hill scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Farrell Flat scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Faraway Hill or Farrell Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Farrell Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
